overall.description: First-person helicopter cockpit view flying through heavy fog over a coastal industrial harbor, dense urban residential districts, and a large stadium before climbing into thick cloud cover and entering complete whiteout conditions. The footage is clearly from a flight simulator game featuring a detailed AS350 instrument panel.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal industrial harbor with docks and warehouses

agents.ego_description: piloting helicopter over harbor area at low altitude, maintaining steady course

entered.detail: AS350 helicopter instrument panel with flight gauges and GPS display
calm water surface of the harbor basin
low-rise industrial warehouses and factory structures
wooden and concrete docking structures along the shoreline
large industrial building with distinctive red roofing

segments.scene_description: The helicopter flies low over a foggy industrial harbor, with the AS350 instrument panel visible in the foreground. Below, docks and warehouses line the water's edge while the city skyline looms faintly through the mist in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban residential district with grid street pattern

events.description: transitions from harbor industrial zone to dense urban residential area

agents.ego_description: flying over compact residential blocks, maintaining altitude while observing the urban grid below

entered.detail: dense grid of residential buildings with red-tiled roofs

segments.scene_description: The helicopter continues over a densely packed urban residential area characterized by grid-patterned streets and uniform apartment blocks. The industrial harbor recedes into the background as the cityscape fills the view below.

scene_state.functional_zone: large sports stadium surrounded by residential areas

events.description: begins gradual ascent while approaching large stadium structure

agents.ego_description: flying past a large stadium while beginning to climb altitude into thicker fog layer

entered.detail: large modern sports arena with distinctive curved white roof

segments.scene_description: The helicopter passes a prominent stadium with a curved white roof while continuing its flight over the city. The aircraft begins a gradual climb as the fog thickens, reducing visibility of the ground details below.

scene_state.functional_zone: high altitude ascent through thick fog layer over mountains

events.description: enters thick fog bank, ground visibility significantly reduced
ground features become almost completely obscured by dense cloud cover

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily into thick fog layer, transitioning to instrument flight conditions

entered.detail: mountain range becoming visible through breaks in the fog

segments.scene_description: The helicopter climbs steadily into thickening fog, with the urban landscape fading below. Distant mountains become faintly visible through the mist before the ground disappears entirely into the gray-white cloud layer.

scene_state.functional_zone: complete whiteout conditions inside dense cloud layer

events.description: enters complete whiteout with zero external visibility, only instrument panel visible

agents.ego_description: flying on instruments through complete whiteout conditions with no visual reference to ground or horizon

entered.detail: dense uniform gray-white cloud filling entire field of view

segments.scene_description: The helicopter is now completely enveloped in dense cloud with zero visibility. Only the AS350 instrument panel remains visible as the aircraft continues flight through the whiteout conditions, entirely dependent on instruments for navigation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight from a low-altitude glide over a misty industrial harbor into a gradual ascent above a dense urban landscape. It begins with the AS350 instrument panel in the foreground as the aircraft skims over docks and warehouses, with a faint city skyline looming through the fog. As the helicopter moves forward, the industrial waterfront recedes and the view shifts to a densely packed residential district defined by grid-patterned streets and uniform apartment blocks. The scene then passes over a prominent stadium with a curved white roof before the aircraft begins a steady climb. Finally, the ground details fade away as the fog thickens, enveloping the city in a heavy white haze.

The shot follows a continuous ascent from a fading urban landscape into a total atmospheric whiteout. It begins with the helicopter climbing steadily into thickening fog, causing the city below to blur and recede. As the aircraft rises further, distant mountains become faintly visible through the mist before the ground disappears entirely into a dense, gray-white cloud layer. The scene then shifts into a state of zero visibility as the helicopter becomes completely enveloped in the clouds. Finally, the environment vanishes into a seamless white void, leaving only the detailed AS350 instrument panel visible as the primary point of reference.
